moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Qualifying Rounds Underway
moments.blurb: The road to Wimbledon's main draw continues today with qualifying rounds for the prestigious tennis tournament taking place this week.

angles.name: Qualifying Buzz
angles.copy: That unmistakable sound of summer: Wimbledon qualifying is in full swing today, with players battling for a spot in the main draw. Who are you backing to make it through? #Wimbledon

angles.name: Tennis Fever
angles.copy: Centre Court dreams begin this week! The Wimbledon 2026 qualifying rounds are live, bringing us closer to the main event. Get ready for two weeks of grass-court action.

moments.title: UK Braces for Record Heatwave
moments.blurb: An extreme and potentially record-breaking heatwave is set to hit England and Wales this week, with temperatures forecast to reach between 35°C and 40°C on Wednesday and Thursday.

angles.name: Heatwave Warning
angles.copy: It's going to be a scorcher! Temperatures are climbing across the UK this week, with parts of England and Wales set for a potentially record-breaking heatwave. Stay hydrated and stay safe!

angles.name: Devon Heat
angles.copy: Devon, get ready to feel the heat! Temperatures are soaring this week, with an amber warning in place for extreme heat. How are you keeping cool in Exeter and beyond?

angles.name: Welsh Heat
angles.copy: Wales is set for a sweltering few days! Extreme heat is forecast, with highs potentially hitting 40°C. Make sure you're taking precautions to beat the heat.

moments.title: Love Island 2026 Drama Continues
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK, which started on June 1st, is providing nightly drama and fresh couplings from the Mallorca villa on ITV2 and ITVX.

angles.name: Villa Vibes
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of Love Island drama! Who's coupling up, who's cracking on, and who's getting pied off tonight? Tune in at 9 PM!

angles.name: Summer of Love (Island)
angles.copy: Your summer soundtrack and your summer TV obsession! Love Island 2026 is still delivering all the feels and the fireworks. What's been your favourite moment so far?

moments.title: House of the Dragon Season 3 Takes Flight
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated third season of HBO's House of the Dragon began streaming on Monday, June 22nd, continuing the epic saga of the Targaryen civil war.

angles.name: Dragon's Return
angles.copy: The dance of dragons is back! House of the Dragon Season 3 dropped yesterday, and we're already gripped. Who's watching and what are your early predictions?

angles.name: Westeros Latest
angles.copy: Back to Westeros! House of the Dragon Season 3 is now streaming. Catch up on all the Targaryen drama and political intrigue.

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Official Draw
moments.blurb: The official draw for The Championships, Wimbledon 2026, is scheduled for Thursday, June 26th, setting the stage for the main tournament starting June 29th.

angles.name: Draw Day Approaching
angles.copy: Who will face who? The Wimbledon 2026 draw is just days away on Thursday! Get ready for the reveal of the brackets and some potential early clashes.

angles.name: Road to the Final
angles.copy: The wait is almost over for the Wimbledon draw! Thursday will unveil the paths to glory for this year's tennis titans at SW19. Who's your pick for the title?

moments.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender Season 2 on Netflix
moments.blurb: The second season of the live-action adaptation, Avatar: The Last Airbender, is set to stream on Netflix from Thursday, June 25th.

angles.name: New Airbender
angles.copy: Your next binge-watch is almost here! Avatar: The Last Airbender Season 2 hits Netflix on Thursday. Are you ready to return to the four nations?

moments.title: The Bear Season 5 Arrives on Disney+
moments.blurb: Critically acclaimed series The Bear returns for its fifth season, streaming on Disney+ from Friday, June 26th.

angles.name: Chef's Kiss
angles.copy: Yes, chef! The Bear Season 5 is coming to Disney+ this Friday. Get ready for more intense kitchen drama and culinary brilliance.

moments.title: Happy 61st Birthday, Saul Davies of James
moments.blurb: Saul Davies, guitarist and violinist for the iconic British band James, celebrates his 61st birthday on Saturday, June 28th.

angles.name: James Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 61st Birthday to Saul Davies, the incredible guitarist and violinist from James, this Saturday! What's your favourite James track?

moments.title: Wimbledon Main Tournament Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The main tournament of The Championships, Wimbledon 2026, begins on Monday, June 29th, with two weeks of world-class tennis at the All England Club.

angles.name: Game, Set, Match!
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon 2026 officially begins on Monday. Who are you hoping to see lift the trophy this year?

angles.name: London's Grand Slam
angles.copy: The greatest tennis tournament in the world starts next Monday right here in London! Wimbledon 2026 kicks off with the first round of singles matches.

moments.title: Happy 48th Birthday, Nicole Scherzinger
moments.blurb: Pussycat Dolls frontwoman and X Factor judge Nicole Scherzinger celebrates her 48th birthday on Sunday, June 29th.

source.l: Musicians Born on June 29 / AP News

angles.name: Pussycat Doll's Day
angles.copy: Don't Cha wish it was your birthday? Wishing a fantastic 48th Birthday to the one and only Nicole Scherzinger this Sunday! What's your favourite Pussycat Dolls hit?

moments.title: Happy 78th Birthday, Ian Paice of Deep Purple
moments.blurb: Ian Paice, the legendary drummer and only constant member of Deep Purple, turns 78 on Sunday, June 29th.

source.l: Musicians Born on June 29 / AP News

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: Smoke on the water, fire in the drums! Happy 78th Birthday to Deep Purple's iconic drummer, Ian Paice, this Sunday!

moments.title: Happy 73rd Birthday, Colin Hay of Men at Work
moments.blurb: Colin Hay, the distinctive voice and frontman of Australian new wave band Men at Work, celebrates his 73rd birthday on Sunday, June 29th.

source.l: Musicians Born on June 29 / AP News

angles.name: Down Under Legend
angles.copy: Can you hear that? It's the sound of a birthday celebration! Happy 73rd Birthday to Men at Work's Colin Hay this Sunday!

moments.title: Happy 66th Birthday, Evelyn 'Champagne' King
moments.blurb: Disco legend Evelyn 'Champagne' King, known for hits like 'Shame' and 'Love Come Down', turns 66 on Sunday, June 29th.

angles.name: Disco Queen's Birthday
angles.copy: Get up and boogie! Wishing a fabulous 66th Birthday to disco icon Evelyn 'Champagne' King this Sunday! What's your favourite track from the queen of funk?

moments.title: Happy 75th Birthday, Stanley Clarke
moments.blurb: Grammy Award-winning jazz fusion bassist and composer Stanley Clarke celebrates his 75th birthday on Monday, June 30th.

source.l: Off The Wall School Of Music

angles.name: Jazz Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to the legendary jazz bassist Stanley Clarke, who turns 75 on Monday! A true master of his craft.

moments.title: Happy 83rd Birthday, Annette Beard of Martha and the Vandellas
moments.blurb: Annette Beard, original member of Motown legends Martha and the Vandellas, celebrates her 83rd birthday on Friday, July 4th.

angles.name: Motown Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Dancing in the street! Wishing a very Happy 83rd Birthday to Annette Beard, an original member of Martha and the Vandellas, this Friday!

moments.title: Happy 40th Birthday, Kellie Pickler
moments.blurb: American country music singer and television personality Kellie Pickler celebrates her 40th birthday on Friday, July 4th.

angles.name: Country Star's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a Happy 40th Birthday to the talented country singer Kellie Pickler this Friday! What's your favourite of her songs?

moments.title: Happy 37th Birthday, Elle King
moments.blurb: Grammy-nominated singer, songwriter, and actress Elle King, known for her unique blend of rock, blues, and country, turns 37 on Friday, July 4th.

angles.name: Genre-Bending Birthday
angles.copy: Ex's & Oh's! Sending Happy 37th Birthday wishes to the incredible Elle King this Friday! What's your favourite track from her?
